text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: MMLEADS │ August 2021 │ V 1.0 90 

MDCR_MC_PACE_MOS 

LABEL: Medicare — Program of All-Inclusive Care for the Elderly (PACE) Months 

DESCRIPTION: This variable is the number of months during the year when the beneficiary was enrolled in a Program 
of All-inclusive Care for the Elderly (PACE) managed care plan. 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: MBSF (derived) 

VALUES: 0–12, or null/missing (if no Medicare enrollment) 

COMMENT: We consider the
